title: Saudia Style Italian Fish Fry
description: A unique Italian dish using saudia spices and ingredients. The fish is marinated in a mixture of saudia spices and herbs, then pan-fried to perfection.
instructions: 2. In a bowl, mix together the saudia spices and garlic.
3. Add the fish pieces to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together the fluffy breadcrumbs and a pinch of salt.
5. Remove the fish from the marinade and coat in the breadcrumb mixture.
6. Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
7. Fry the coated fish pieces until golden brown and cooked through.
8. Serve the fish hot with bitter lettuce, lemon slices, and a side of Italian-style pasta or rice.
